
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(gganimate)
library(forcats)


data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    type = ifelse(nationalitet == "danmark", "Danish", "Non-Danish"),
    købspris = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", købspris))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(købspris))

summary_data <- data %>%
  group_by(sæson, type) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_price = mean(købspris, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
summary_data$sæson <- factor(
  summary_data$sæson,
  levels = c("90/91","95/96","00/01","05/06","10/11","15/16","20/21","25/26")
)

ggplot(summary_data, aes(x = sæson, y = avg_price, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", width = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Transfer values over time",
    subtitle = "Danish vs Non-Danish players",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Average transfer value (€)",
    fill = "Player type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()




  data <- data %>%
    mutate(
      købspris = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", købspris)),
      hold = trimws(tolower(hold))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(købspris))
  avg_spend <- data %>%
    group_by(hold) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_price = mean(købspris, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  placements <- read_csv("Data - placeringer .csv") %>%
    mutate(
      hold = trimws(tolower(hold))
    )
  avg_place <- placements %>%
    group_by(hold) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_finish = mean(placering, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  final_data <- avg_spend %>%
    inner_join(avg_place, by = "hold")

  ggplot(final_data, aes(x = avg_price, y = avg_finish, label = hold)) +
    geom_point(size = 4, color = "#2C7FB8") +

    geom_text(
      nudge_y = 0.3,
      size = 3
    ) +

    scale_y_reverse() +

    labs(
      title = "Average transfer price vs average league finish",
      subtitle = "Each point represents a team",
      x = "Average transfer price (€)",
      y = "Average league position (1 = best)"
    ) +

    theme_minimal()








  data <- data %>%
    mutate(
      hold = trimws(tolower(hold)),
      nationalitet = trimws(tolower(nationalitet))
    )
  foreign_counts <- data %>%
    filter(nationalitet != "danmark") %>%
    group_by(hold) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_foreign = n() / n_distinct(sæson),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  placements <- read_csv("Data - placeringer .csv") %>%
    mutate(
      hold = trimws(tolower(hold))
    )
  avg_place <- placements %>%
    group_by(hold) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_finish = mean(placering, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  final_data <- foreign_counts %>%
    inner_join(avg_place, by = "hold")
  ggplot(final_data, aes(x = avg_foreign, y = avg_finish, label = hold)) +
    geom_point(size = 4, color = "#2C7FB8") +

    geom_text(
      nudge_y = 0.3,
      size = 3
    ) +

    scale_y_reverse() +

    labs(
      title = "Foreign players vs average league finish",
      subtitle = "Each point represents a team",
      x = "Average number of foreign players per season",
      y = "Average league position (1 = best)"
    ) +

    theme_minimal()












  data_clean2 <- data %>%
    mutate(
      købspris = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", købspris)),
      hold = trimws(tolower(hold))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(købspris))

  avg_spend <- data_clean2 %>%
    group_by(hold) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_price = mean(købspris, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  placements <- read_csv("Data - placeringer .csv") %>%
    mutate(hold = trimws(tolower(hold)))
  avg_place <- placements %>%
    group_by(hold) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_finish = mean(placering, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  final_data_price <- avg_spend %>%
    inner_join(avg_place, by = "hold")

  View(final_data_price)

  ggplot(final_data_price, aes(x = avg_price, y = avg_finish, label = hold)) +
    geom_point(size = 4, color = "#2C7FB8") +
    geom_text(nudge_y = 0.3, size = 3) +
    scale_y_reverse() +
    labs(
      title = "Average transfer price vs average league finish",
      subtitle = "Each point represents a team",
      x = "Average transfer price (€)",
      y = "Average league position (1 = best)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()










  data_clean <- data %>%
    mutate(
      hold = trimws(tolower(hold)),
      nationalitet = trimws(tolower(nationalitet))
    )

  foreign_counts <- data_clean %>%
    filter(nationalitet != "danmark") %>%
    group_by(hold) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_foreign = n() / n_distinct(sæson),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  placements <- read_csv("Data - placeringer .csv") %>%
    mutate(hold = trimws(tolower(hold)))

  avg_place <- placements %>%
    group_by(hold) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_finish = mean(placering, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  final_data_foreign <- foreign_counts %>%
    inner_join(avg_place, by = "hold")
  View(final_data_foreign)

  ggplot(final_data_foreign, aes(x = avg_foreign, y = avg_finish, label = hold)) +
    geom_point(size = 4, color = "#2C7FB8") +
    geom_text(nudge_y = 0.3, size = 3) +
    scale_y_reverse() +
    labs(
      title = "Foreign players vs average league finish",
      subtitle = "Each point represents a team",
      x = "Average number of foreign players per season",
      y = "Average league position (1 = best)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  ``
